config.goal: all issues (quality, security, performance, architecture, reliability, UX, DevOps)

findings.title: No CI pipeline for web app — zero automated quality gates
findings.recommendation: Add GitHub Actions CI workflow: lint + typecheck + test + build

findings.title: Middleware discards Supabase session refresh cookies
findings.recommendation: Return supabaseResponse instead of new NextResponse

findings.title: CSP allows unsafe-inline and unsafe-eval
findings.recommendation: Remove unsafe-eval; use nonce-based CSP for inline scripts

findings.title: PostGIS installed but unused — spatial filtering in JavaScript
findings.recommendation: Create Supabase RPC function with ST_DWithin

findings.title: Race condition: stale API responses overwrite fresh data
findings.recommendation: Store AbortController in ref, abort in useEffect cleanup

findings.title: User IP addresses exposed in API responses
findings.recommendation: Remove uploaded_by_ip from SELECT and POST response

findings.title: PriceCard context menu keyboard trap
findings.recommendation: Add Escape key handler and focus management

findings.title: Prices GET handler is 300-line monolith
findings.recommendation: Extract into lib/prices.ts with composable functions

findings.title: God component page.tsx with 18 useState hooks
findings.recommendation: Extract usePriceQuery hook and tab content components

findings.title: Duplicate interfaces bypass shared type system
